privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for wps_presentation_env market_brief_synthesis task. Verified that the task dynamically generates a synthetic 20-slide PowerPoint presentation via python-pptx in setup_task.sh. Confirmed that the 3 contaminating pharma slides ('Global Pharma Distribution...', 'Pharmaceutical Wholesaler Concentration...', 'Specialty Drug Distribution Margins...') are generated at 1-indexed positions 6, 13, and 18. Also verified that the required output file path, slide order, and expected final slide count of 17 match the generated specification document and verifier script logic.
